title: Triple Moon Mug,Black
features: A quality ceramic mug featuring the Wiccan Triple Moon design on a black base.
The Triple Moon symbolises the waxing, full and waning moon which represents the aspects of mother the maiden and the crone.

specifications_table.Care instructions: ‎Hand Wash Only, Machine Wash, Microwave safe
